_meta.description: Gift acceptance policy + donor stewardship + receipt issuance + refund policy. Drives /donate page copy, Stripe webhook handlers, and tax-receipt generation.

acceptedTypes.policy: sell on receipt; do not hold
convert to USD on receipt; do not hold
must align with mission; donor responsible for valuation
track for transparency, not booked as revenue per GAAP

declinedTypes.reason: no infrastructure to evaluate, hold, or dispose; revisit when reserve > $500k

anonymityRespect.policy: Anonymous gifts accepted at all amounts. Publicly listed donor recognition opt-in only.
anonymityRespect.internalRecord: always kept for audit trail and tax compliance, even when public name is withheld

namingRights.policy: No naming rights granted that constitute private benefit. Honorary recognition only — recipient's name may appear on a program or fund but P31 retains full control of the named asset.
namingRights.reversible: P31 retains right to re-name on documented breach of values or mission

recurringDonations.remindersBeforeCharge: annually summarize prior year giving by January 31

fullRefundConditions: Donor requests within 30 days for any reason
Charge does not match donor intent (wrong amount, wrong frequency, wrong fund)
partialRefundConditions: Recurring donation cancellation outside 30-day window: future charges canceled, prior charges retained
refundPolicy.refundsAreNotTaxDeductible: Donor must amend tax return if refund issued in following calendar year
refundPolicy.processingTime: 5-10 business days back to original payment method

taxReceipts.issuedFor: every contribution >= $1, regardless of IRS threshold
taxReceipts.channel: email immediately + downloadable PDF in donor portal
taxReceipts.annualSummary: January 31 of year following contribution year

body: Thank you for your contribution to P31 Labs, Inc., a Georgia nonprofit corporation.
No goods or services were provided in exchange for this contribution.
P31 Labs, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt organization (status pending; receipts retroactive to incorporation date upon IRS determination).
Please retain this receipt for your tax records.

irsConditionalLanguage.untilDeterminationLetter: P31 Labs, Inc. has applied for 501(c)(3) status. Donations made before IRS determination are deductible retroactively to incorporation date if the application is approved. We will notify you upon receipt of the determination letter.
irsConditionalLanguage.afterDeterminationLetter: P31 Labs, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt organization. EIN: 42-1888158.

newDonorWelcome.content: Mission summary, what their gift will do, how to follow progress, no upsell

anniversaryAcknowledgment.monthly: no — recurring donors should not be re-thanked monthly (annoyance)
anniversaryAcknowledgment.annual: yes — annual giving summary + impact recap

lapsedDonorReengagement.lapsedDefinition: no gift in 14 months (1 year + 60-day grace)
lapsedDonorReengagement.rationale: Respect operator's no-FOMO ethos; never harass

privacy.thirdPartyAccess: vendors required for processing only; under DPA
privacy.dataRetention: 7 years per IRS + state requirements; anonymized after retention period

ethicalScreening.policy: Major gifts (>= $10,000) screened against: known sanctions lists, demonstrated values misalignment, ongoing litigation alleging mission-relevant harm. Decline option always preserved.
ethicalScreening.process: Treasurer + Chair review; majority vote of independent board members for declines
ethicalScreening.documentationRequired: rationale for accept/decline of all major gifts, retained per document-retention policy
